animeStory2Codes.title: Anime Story 2 Codes
animeStory2Codes.intro: Use the latest Anime Story 2 codes for Gems, Trait Tokens, Secret Orbs, and extra progression resources before starting long farming sessions.

cards.reward: 15 Red Stars, 50 Trait Tokens, 10,000 Gems, 500 Slime Tokens, and 15 Secret Orbs

animeStory2Codes.redeemTitle: How to redeem Anime Story 2 codes
redeemSteps: Launch Anime Story 2 on Roblox and complete the tutorial.
Press the Codes button on the right side of the screen.
Paste one code exactly and click Claim.
Rejoin after updates if a code does not apply immediately.

animeStory2BeginnerGuide.title: Anime Story 2 Beginner Guide
animeStory2BeginnerGuide.intro: This Anime Story 2 route keeps early progression simple: get free resources first, build one core team, then delay expensive rerolls until your roster stabilizes.

steps.title: Finish tutorial and unlock menus
steps.description: Clear the intro flow before spending Gems or reroll tokens.

steps.title: Redeem all active codes first
steps.description: Grab early Gems and Trait Tokens before summoning.

steps.title: Build one main squad
steps.description: Equip your strongest five units and focus on synergy.

steps.title: Upgrade one carry first
steps.description: Concentrate upgrade resources instead of spreading them thin.

steps.title: Farm quests and stage clears daily
steps.description: Use dailies and story progression to refill Gems and upgrade materials.

animeStory2TierList.title: Anime Story 2 Tier List
animeStory2TierList.intro: Use this Anime Story 2 tier snapshot to prioritize investment and banner decisions across story, raids, and long-form grind content.

animeStory2UnitsGuide.title: Anime Story 2 Units Guide
animeStory2UnitsGuide.intro: Anime Story 2 unit value depends on role coverage, scaling speed, and upgrade cost, not just rarity labels.

cards.name: Carry DPS Units
cards.description: Use one high-damage carry to secure stage wins and boss clears.

cards.name: Support and Utility Units
cards.description: Prioritize allies that add first-strike, healing, crit boost, or enemy marks.

cards.name: Tank Units
cards.description: One stable frontline slot prevents resets in tower and raid runs.

cards.name: Bridge Legendary Units
cards.description: Strong Legendary picks can carry while waiting for Mythic and Secret upgrades.

animeStory2TraitsRerollsGuide.title: Anime Story 2 Traits and Rerolls Guide
animeStory2TraitsRerollsGuide.intro: Anime Story 2 trait rerolls pay off most when used on long-term units instead of temporary leveling units.

traits.name: Damage Traits
traits.description: Use on carry DPS units for faster clears and better boss pressure.

traits.name: Speed and Turn Traits
traits.description: Strong for teams that depend on opening action order.

traits.name: Defensive Traits
traits.description: Best for tank slots in raids, tower, and high-pressure modes.

traits.name: Support Traits
traits.description: Increase consistency for healing, crit boosts, and team buffs.

animeStory2WorldsProgression.title: Anime Story 2 Worlds and Story Progression
animeStory2WorldsProgression.intro: Anime Story 2 progression is fastest when each world clear feeds upgrades for the next unlock.

steps.title: Clear current world fully
steps.description: Finish stage goals and side requirements before pushing forward.

steps.title: Upgrade core team after each unlock
steps.description: Spend rewards immediately on your main five units.

steps.title: Rotate between story and daily quests
steps.description: Sustain Gems, tokens, and materials while unlocking worlds.

steps.title: Prepare for challenge and raid gates
steps.description: Use world rewards to meet the damage and survivability checks.

animeStory2ItemsRelicsMaterials.title: Anime Story 2 Items Relics and Evolution Materials
animeStory2ItemsRelicsMaterials.intro: Anime Story 2 resources should be split by immediate use and long-term investment to avoid waste.

cards.name: Summon Currency
cards.description: Spend only when banners align with your priority units.

cards.name: Trait Tokens
cards.description: Save for units that already occupy permanent team slots.

cards.name: Secret Orbs and Ascend Tickets
cards.description: Reserve for upgrade breakpoints on high-value units.

cards.name: Event Tokens
cards.description: Compare event shop value before spending on short-term items.

animeStory2TowerRaidsSlimeEvent.title: Anime Story 2 Tower Raids and Slime Event
animeStory2TowerRaidsSlimeEvent.intro: Anime Story 2 endgame progression comes from cycling tower, raids, and event loops with a stable roster plan.

cards.name: Tower of Ascension
cards.description: Climb consistently with one carry, one tank, and dependable support units.

cards.name: Raids
cards.description: Prioritize single-target burst and survival for boss phases.

cards.name: Slime Event
cards.description: Spend event tokens on resources that unlock permanent roster upgrades.

faq.title: Anime Story 2
faq.subtitle: Quick answers for Anime Story 2 progression, codes, and event loops

questions.question: How often do Anime Story 2 codes update?
questions.answer: Anime Story 2 codes usually appear around updates, milestones, and re-release announcements.

questions.question: What should I do first in Anime Story 2?
questions.answer: Complete the tutorial, redeem codes, build a five-unit core team, then push story worlds and dailies.

questions.question: Which mode gives the best Anime Story 2 late-game rewards?
questions.answer: Tower, raids, and event cycles provide the strongest long-term reward loops when your core roster is stable.

questions.question: When should I reroll traits in Anime Story 2?
questions.answer: Reroll after you confirm a unit is part of your long-term team, so Trait Tokens are not wasted.
